---
title: "3a: Core/Accessory/Rare Gene Classification Report"
---

## Overview

This report summarizes the Core/Accessory/Rare (CAR) gene classification step, which partitions the pangenome into three frequency-based categories using a fitted power-law model.

## CAR Classification Summary

```{python}
import pandas as pd

summary = pd.read_csv("../output/data/3a_car_summary.csv")
for _, row in summary.iterrows():
    print(f"{row['category']}: {row['n_genes']} genes (threshold: {row['threshold']})")
```

## Gene Frequency Distribution

![](../output/figures/3a_gene_frequency.png){width=80%}

## Pangenome Segment Fitting

![](../output/figures/3a_pangenome_segments.png){width=80%}
